contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Edgar: log ledger-tagged Stripe checkouts + mode-aware key + Environment column (deployed)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1052
  
  Details:
  Edgar patch + production deploy unlocking ledger-tagged Stripe checkouts.
  
  After capoeira → GAS → Stripe was end-to-end working, traced through the
  remaining gap: Edgar's MetaCheckoutOrderSync was filtering non-Wix /
  non-meta-channel sessions out before they ever reached append_checkout_log,
  so a capoeira → TBM test session was never landing in the "Stripe Social
  Media Checkout ID" tab — breaking the downstream stripe_sales_sync.gs
  routing the doc promised.
  
  Three blockers identified:
  1. `eligible_session?` required metadata.channel == 'meta' AND
     metadata.wix_products present. Capoeira sessions have neither.
  2. Even if we bypassed (1), the rest of sync! was Wix-coupled
     (parse_products → fetch_products → create_order).
  3. The Sidekiq worker used the globally-set Stripe.api_key (live key in
     prod), so retrieving a cs_test_... session 404'd before the service ran.
  
  Shipped in TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer#1052 (merged + deployed via
  ./deploy.sh to seni_ror_new + seni_sk_new at 21:04 PT 2026-05-10):
  
  - New `ledger_tagged_session?` recognizer (metadata.ledger OR line-item
    description starts with [LEDGER_ID] and not a meta session) +
    `sync_ledger_only!` + `append_ledger_log` that skips Wix entirely and
    writes to the audit Sheet directly.
  - `MetaCheckoutOrderSyncWorker` selects Stripe key by session id prefix
    (cs_test_ → config.stripe_test_secret; otherwise config.stripe_secret).
    Missing key → warn + no-op instead of raise.
  - production.rb adds stripe_test_secret using the same test key already
    in dev/test envs.
  - Gdrive::StripeCheckoutLog gets a new Environment column at Q
    ('PRODUCTION' for live mode, 'SANDBOX' for test) so dashboards can
    filter test rows. Writes to col Q directly via ws[row, col] so it
    doesn't disturb cols J–P owned by other GAS writers
    (stripe_sales_sync.gs Ledger Routed flag, etc.). Header self-populates
    on first run.
  - Tagging applies to BOTH the existing Meta/Wix path AND the new
    ledger-only path.
  
  End-to-end verification:
  - Live edgar.truesight.me/ping → 200 post-deploy.
  - Gary completed a test Stripe Checkout donation (cs_test_a1vwNOiOx5B0...)
    and received the default Stripe receipt email — confirming Stripe's
    customer-email collection + receipt-on-success setting are working.
  
  PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1052
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
